prose:
**Ethylene frontier-orbital result** — Property: HOMO–LUMO frontier-orbital gap. Method: DFT tier `standard`, explicitly run as **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** in **PySCF**. Geometry: fixed, user-supplied XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz` (single-point orbital calculation; not geometry-optimized in this run). Environment: **gas phase** (`solvent: null`). Charge 0, multiplicity 1. Density fitting was **not** requested. SCF converged: **true**, in 6 cycles. Engine integrity trustworthy verdict: **true**.

Headline value: **HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV**.

Additional orbital values returned by chemkit: HOMO = -7.6155818 eV; LUMO = -0.17986527 eV. Total electronic energy = -78.623486 hartree (-2139.4541 eV).

Warnings: no warnings were returned in the chemkit result.

Reproducibility: chemkit CLI invocation returned was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmprukw2w74/live.json`. The API result did not include a live `.out` log path, so I cannot truthfully name one beyond the returned JSON output path `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmprukw2w74/live.json`.
